headline: Brown & Brown (NYSE:BRO) Posts Q1 CY2026 Sales In Line With Estimates
summary: Insurance brokerage firm Brown & Brown (NYSE:BRO) met Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 35.4% year on year to $1.90 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.39 per share was 2.3% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Brown & Brown, Inc. announces first quarter 2026 results, including total revenues of $1.9 billion, an increase of 35.4%; flat Organic Revenue; growth of Organic Revenue with Contingents of 2.2%; diluted net income per share of $1.06; Diluted Net Income Per Share - Adjusted of $1.39; and a quarterly dividend of $0.165 per share
summary: DAYTONA BEACH, Fla., April 27, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Brown & Brown, Inc. (NYSE:BRO) (the "Company") announced its unaudited financial results for the first quarter of 2026. headline: Brown & Brown profit jumps on Accession buy, higher fees and commissions
summary: Brown & Brown reported a28.7% jump in first-quarter profit on Monday as the insurancebroker benefited from higher commissions and fees and theacquisition of rival Accession Risk Management. ...

headline: Brown & Brown Earnings Are Imminent; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
summary: BRO to release Q1 earnings on April 27, analysts predict $1.36 EPS and $1.89B revenue. Appointed Eileen Akerson as chief legal officer. Stock fell 2.4%.
